content.cn_text: 你将听到坎伯主题公园的播客。
content.en_text: You will hear a podcast on Camber's Theme Park.

content.cn_text: 主持人:欢迎来到坎伯公园播客。
content.en_text: Presenter: Welcome to Camber's Park podcast.

content.cn_text: 在接下来的几分钟里，我会告诉你一些关于公园的事情，以及我们提供的令人惊奇的东西。
content.en_text: In the next few minutes, I'll tell you a little about the park and the amazing things we have to offer.

content.cn_text: 我们认为坎伯的主题公园比其他主题公园提供的更多。
content.en_text: We like to think that Camber's offers more than other theme parks.

content.cn_text: 像他们一样，我们有各种各样的令人兴奋的游乐设施，适合所有年龄段的人，但坎伯也非常重视游客的教育体验……不是无聊的事实，而是很多互动展览。
content.en_text: Like them, we have a variety of exciting rides for people of all ages, but Camber's also places strong emphasis on the educational experience for its visitors ... not boring facts but lots of interactive exhibits.

content.cn_text: 虽然主要是户外体验，但如果天气太糟糕，我们也会有一些室内活动。
content.en_text: Although it's mainly an outdoor experience, we do have some indoor activities if the weather gets too dreadful.

content.cn_text: 这座公园坐落在旅游胜地杜尔切斯特以南约三英里的80英亩美丽的乡村，给人一种可爱而古老的感觉。
content.en_text: The park's got a lovely well established feel, set in eighty acres of beautiful countryside about three miles south of the tourist resort of Dulchester.

content.cn_text: 该公园于1997年由坎伯家族建立，但在2004年被新的所有者接管，他们保持了坎伯家族最初的愿景。
content.en_text: The park was set up in nineteen ninety seven by the Camber family but then taken over by new owners in two thousand and four, who have maintained the original vision of the Cambers.

content.cn_text: 它有许多古树，数百个花坛和一个美丽的湖泊。
content.en_text: It has lots of old trees, hundreds of flower beds and a gorgeous lake.

content.cn_text: 坎伯游乐园有超过45个不同的游乐设施、展览和拱廊。
content.en_text: Camber's has over forty- five different rides, exhibits and arcades.

content.cn_text: 只要你付了入场费，除了一个之外，所有这些都是免费的(我们对我们最新的游乐设施收取少量费用，以减少排队的时间)。
content.en_text: All but one of these is free once you have paid your entrance fee (we charge a small fee for our newest ride, to reduce the length of the queues).

content.cn_text: 你不用付停车费。
content.en_text: You don't pay anything for parking.

content.cn_text: 一张家庭票——一个四口之家——每人大约8英镑，这是一个惊人的价值。
content.en_text: A family ticket - for a family of four - works out at about eight pounds per person, which is amazing value.

content.cn_text: 我们的网站上显示了当前价格的详细信息，以及乘车等的详细信息，以及到达我们的方向。
content.en_text: Full details of current prices are shown on our website, along with full details of rides, etc., and directions for getting to us.

content.cn_text: 我们也有一些特别优惠。
content.en_text: We also have a number of special offers.

content.cn_text: 例如，如果你住在当地，为什么不加入我们的冒险家俱乐部呢?在那里，你可以全年享受五折的票价，还有一条专门的游乐设施和展览“通道”，这意味着你不必等待进入
content.en_text: For example, if you live locally, why not join our Adventurers' Club, which entitles you fifty percent off ticket prices all year round, and a special 'lane' for all rides and exhibits which means you don't have to wait to get into

content.cn_text: 公园的任何地方。
content.en_text: any part of the park.

content.cn_text: 请参阅网站上的Offers选项卡。
content.en_text: See the Offers tab on the website.

content.cn_text: 我们最近在公园里增加了一些新的展品，我们特别自豪的是我们的未来农场区，里面有20多种不同的动物，从花栗鼠到奶牛。
content.en_text: We've recently added a number of new exhibits to the park, and we're particularly proud of our Future Farm Zone, which houses over twenty different species of animals, from chipmunks to dairy cows.

content.cn_text: 重点是要接近动物——所有的动物都可以被抚摸，你可以购买食物来喂养动物。
content.en_text: The emphasis is on getting near to the animals - all of them can be petted and you can buy food for feeding the animals.

content.cn_text: 许多年轻的游客说，这是他们访问的高潮!
content.en_text: Many of our younger visitors say that this is the high point of their visit!

content.cn_text: 说到食物，别让动物独占了所有的乐趣。
content.en_text: And speaking of food, don't let the animals have all the fun.

content.cn_text: 我们总共有七个不同的餐饮网点。
content.en_text: We have a total of seven different catering outlets on the site.

content.cn_text: 我们全年营业时间从10点到5点30分，在营业时间内可以随时购买冷饮和小吃。
content.en_text: We're open ten to five thirty all year round and cold drinks and snacks can be bought at any time during opening hours.

content.cn_text: 饿马咖啡馆每天大部分时间都提供热食——从11点到5点——离关门还有半小时。
content.en_text: And hot food is available most of the day in the Hungry Horse cafe - from eleven until five - just half an hour before closing time.

content.cn_text: 主持人:现在我们希望所有的游客来公园的时候都能有一段激动人心的时光，但是我们的首要任务必须是安全。
content.en_text: Presenter: Now we want all our visitors to have an exciting time when they come to the park but our first priority must be safety.

content.cn_text: 父母和监护人了解孩子的行为和能力。
content.en_text: Parents and guardians know their children's behaviour and capabilities.

content.cn_text: 但是在这里，我们为每个游乐设施设定了一定的条件，以确保所有游客都能从体验中获得最大的乐趣，并始终感到安全。
content.en_text: But here at the park we have set certain conditions for each of the rides to ensure that all visitors get the maximum enjoyment out of the experience and feel secure at all times.

content.cn_text: 公园里有四个主要的游乐设施。
content.en_text: There are four major rides at the park.

content.cn_text: 我们最新的游乐项目是“河上冒险”，旨在重现激流漂流的体验。
content.en_text: Our newest ride is the River Adventure which is designed to reproduce the experience of white-water rafting.

content.cn_text: 再多的防护服也不会有什么区别，所以只有在你准备淋湿的情况下才去骑这趟车!
content.en_text: No amount of protective clothing would make any difference so only go on this ride if you're prepared to get wet!

content.cn_text: 8岁以下的儿童可以乘坐这个游乐设施，但所有16岁以下的儿童必须有一个成年人陪同。
content.en_text: Children under eight can go on this ride, but all under sixteens must have an adult with them.

content.cn_text: 并非我们所有的游乐设施都是为刺激和溢出而设计的。
content.en_text: Not all of our rides are designed for thrills and spills.

content.cn_text: 我们的丛林吉姆过山车是一个温和的版本，经典的循环，专为整个家庭的享受-从最小的孩子到年老的祖父母，适合各种残疾和健康状况。
content.en_text: Our Jungle Jim rollercoaster is a gentler version of the classic loop the loop, specially created for whole family enjoyment -from the smallest children to elderly grandparents, suitable for all levels of disability and health conditions.

content.cn_text: 车厢有多达8人的舒适座位，每位乘客都必须随时系好安全带。
content.en_text: Carriages have comfortable seating for up to eight people, with safety belts for each passenger which must be worn at all times.

content.cn_text: 坐下来欣赏风景吧!
content.en_text: Sit back and enjoy the scenery!

content.cn_text: 坎伯最成熟和最受欢迎的游乐设施之一是巨大的俯冲滑梯。
content.en_text: One of the best established and most popular of Camber's rides is the massive Swoop Slide.

content.cn_text: 从9米高的光滑垂直滑梯上呼啸而下，尽情尖叫吧。
content.en_text: Whizz down the polished vertical slide nine metres in height and scream to your heart's content.

content.cn_text: 没有年龄和身高限制。
content.en_text: There are no age or height restrictions.

content.cn_text: 不过要小心——你必须穿长裤，这样你就不会被速度灼伤了!
content.en_text: Be careful though - you must have on long trousers so you won't get any speed burns!

content.cn_text: 然后是著名的拉链卡丁车体育场，有16辆车:8辆供单人驾驶，8辆供喜欢和妈妈、爸爸或照顾者一起驾驶的孩子们使用。
content.en_text: And then there's the famous Zip Go-kart stadium with sixteen carts: eight for single drivers and eight for kids preferring to ride along with mum, dad or carer.

content.cn_text: 参加高速比赛，在我们特别设计的一级方程式风格的卡丁车-但没有碰撞其他卡丁车，请。
content.en_text: Take part in high-speed races in our specially designed Formula One-style karts - but no bumping other karts, please.

content.cn_text: 所有的车手必须在1.2米以上，因为他们必须能够够到踏板。即使是在共享卡丁车上。
content.en_text: All riders must be above one point two metres because they have to be able to reach the pedals ... even in the shared karts.

content.cn_text: 所有安全功能的详细信息可在我们的网站www.Camberspark.com上获得。
content.en_text: Full details of all safety features are available on our website at www.Camberspark.com.

content.cn_text: 所以来坎伯的主题公园玩一天吧!
content.en_text: So come and make a day of it at Camber's Theme Park!

groups.desc:
Questions 11-16
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: According to the speaker, in what way is Camber's different from other theme parks?

options.title: A
options.content: It's suitable for different age groups.

options.title: B
options.content: It offers lots to do in wet weather.

options.title: C
options.content: It has a focus on education.

items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是C "It has a focus on education"。文中明确指出Camber's主题公园与其他主题公园的区别在于它"places strong emphasis on the educational experience for its visitors"（为游客提供教育体验）。录音首先提到Camber's和其他主题公园的相似之处，然后用"but"引出了Camber's的独特之处，即强调教育体验。这种对比结构清楚地表明了教育focus是Camber's的独特之处，区别于其他主题公园。

items.title: The Park first opened in
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是B. 1997。原文明确指出公园是在1997年建立的（"The park was set up in nineteen ninety seven"）。虽然文中还提到了2004年，但那是公园被新业主接管的时间，而不是首次开放的时间。题目明确问的是公园首次开放的年份，因此1997年是正确答案。

items.title: What's included in the entrance fee?
items.analysis: 文中明确指出，除了一个最新的游乐设施外，其他所有项目在支付入场费后都是免费的。同时，停车也是免费的。这正好符合选项A "most rides and parking"（大多数游乐设施和停车）的描述。因此，A选项是正确答案。

items.title: Becoming a member of the Adventurers Club means

options.title: A
options.content: you can avoiding queuing so much.

options.title: B
options.content: you can enter the Park free for a year.

options.title: C
options.content: you can visit certain zones closed to other people.

items.analysis: 文中明确提到Adventurers' Club会员可以使用特别通道（special 'lane'），并且不需要等待进入公园的任何区域（don't have to wait to get into any part of the park）。这直接对应了选项A中的"avoiding queuing so much"（避免大量排队）。因此，A选项是正确答案。

items.title: The Future Farm zone encourages visitors to

options.title: B
options.content: learn about the care of animals.

items.analysis: 文中明确指出Future Farm Zone的重点是让游客能够靠近动物（"getting near to the animals"），并且提到所有动物都可以被抚摸（"all of them can be petted"）。这直接对应了选项C "get close to the animals"。此外，提到可以购买食物喂养动物，进一步强调了与动物的亲密接触。因此，C选项最准确地概括了Future Farm Zone的主要特点。

items.title: When is hot food available in the park?
items.analysis: 文中明确指出热食供应时间为"from eleven until five"，即从11点到5点。这与选项B完全吻合，因此B是正确答案。题目特别询问的是热食供应时间，而不是公园的整体开放时间或冷饮供应时间，所以需要特别注意区分这些信息。

groups.desc:
Questions 17-20
What special conditions apply to the following rides?
Choose FOUR answers from the box and write the correct letter, A-F, next to the questions 17-20.
Special conditions for visitors

list.title: A
list.content: Must be over a certain age

list.title: C
list.content: Must avoid it if they have health problems

list.title: D
list.content: Must wear a particular type of clothing

list.title: E
list.content: Must be over a certain height

list.title: F
list.content: Must be accompanied by an adult if under

items.title: River Adventure
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是F（Must be accompanied by an adult if under），因为原文明确指出所有16岁以下的人必须有成人陪同。虽然文中提到8岁以下的儿童可以乘坐，但特殊条件是针对16岁以下的所有人，这符合题目要求的"特殊条件"。这个条件既不是简单的年龄限制，也不是其他选项提到的安全装备或服装要求，而是明确的陪同要求。

items.title: Jungle Jim Rollercoaster
items.analysis: 正确答案是B（Must use special safety equipment），因为原文明确提到Jungle Jim过山车的每个乘客都必须全程佩戴安全带。安全带是一种特殊的安全设备，而且强调必须使用（must be worn），这与选项B的描述完全吻合。

items.title: Swoop Slide
items.analysis: 文中明确指出乘坐Swoop Slide时必须穿长裤，这是为了防止高速滑行时可能产生的摩擦灼伤。长裤属于特定类型的衣物，因此正确答案是D（Must wear a particular type of clothing）。这个要求既是为了保证游客的安全，也满足了题目中"special conditions"的要求。

items.title: Zip Go-carts
items.analysis: 文中明确指出Zip Go-kart的骑乘者必须高于1.2米，这是因为他们需要能够够到踏板。这个要求适用于所有卡丁车，包括共享的。因此，正确答案是E（Must be over a certain height），因为这直接对应了文中提到的身高限制。
